Appearance

LazyChat - Documentation

Fast, lightweight and open-source chat-system plugin :3

Configuration

Broadcasts, DMs, Signs, /me and more

The plugin allows you to use MiniMessage ANYWHERE and WHENEVER you want.

Mutes

Easily mute players who break your server rules to stop them from typing anywhere on the server.

Released under the MIT License. Made by LazyCato0o.
